calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion, Motion In Support To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, And Proposed Response
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. MARINA R. FRANCO OF THE WASSERMAN-STERN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 567-9600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CLAIRE FIORENTINO'S Motion In Support To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, And Proposed Response IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN EXCUSABLE NEGLECT GIVEN KNOWLEDGE OF THE SUIT BY AT LEAST DECEMBER 18TH. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/AY
